data.title: 年末特别礼物
data.summary: Sensei, thank you so much for being with Blue Archive throughout 2025! We’ve prepared a special gift
data.body:
Sensei, thank you so much for being with Blue Archive throughout 2025!

We’ve prepared a special gift filled with our warmest wishes for a joyful new year.
Log in during the daily reward period and be sure to claim all your presents~ 🎁

➡️Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3028&thread=3305006

#BlueArchive
